title: Design Tokens
description: Validates design tokens following the W3C Design Tokens Community Group (DTCG) specification. Tokens are the atomic visual decisions of Sentinels Hub — every color, every spacing value, every font choice is a deliberate act of identity.

tokenGroup.description: A group of tokens or nested groups. Groups can contain tokens (objects with $value) or other groups.

$value.description: The token value. Type depends on $type.

$type.description: The token type per W3C DTCG specification.

$description.description: Human-readable description — at Sentinels, every token tells a story.
